name: Close
description: Within arm's length of a target

name: Reach
description: Within 10 feet of a target

name: Near
description: Within an adjacent zone

name: Far
description: 2 or more Zones away

name: Light
description: Up to two weapons with this tag can be weilded at the same time

name: Hefty
description: Only one Hefty item can be wielded at once

name: 1H
description: Can be wielded in 1 hand

name: 2H
description: Must be wielded with both hands

name: Bulky
description: Takes up 2 inventory slots

name: Slow
description: Cannot be used if the attacker moved this turn

name: Restraining
description: When damage from this item equals or exceeds the Restrain value, the target is Restrained (cannot move, attacks are Impaired)

name: Toxic
description: Deals Toxic damage. Inflict Impair for the rest of the scene as a Gambit

name: Fire
description: Deals Fire damage. Inflict Burning 1d4 as a Gambit

name: Lightning
description: Deals Lightning damage. Inflict Stun as a Gambit

name: Armor Piercing
description: Damage dealt ignores the target's Armor

name: Blast
description: Deals damage to all creatures within a Zone

name: Ranged
description: Cannot be used if you start your turn Close to an opponent. Impaired by confined spaces. Opponents gain +1 Armor from Cover.

name: Cold
description: Deals cold damage. Inflicts Immobilized on a Gambit

name: Concealed
description: Can be hidden on your person

name: Blinding
description: Inflicts Blinded on the target. Target can't see for 1 turn.
